ceremony.label: Ceremony at 09:00
ceremony.description: Automatically activates memorial events every day at 9 AM.

autostart.label: Autostart on system boot
autostart.description: Allows the program to start automatically with the system.

grace.label: Grace window
grace.description: Time after 09:00 during which the ceremony can still start.

weekdays.label: Weekdays only
weekdays.description: Disables automatic activation on Saturdays and Sundays.

system_time.label: System time
system_time.description: Use local clock instead of accurate NTP time.

skip_tomorrow.label: Skip tomorrow
skip_tomorrow.description: Cancels only the next scheduled ceremony (one-time).

audio_mode.label: Companion mode
audio_mode.description: Select audio accompaniment: voice, metronome, bell, or anthem.

voice.label: Announcement voice
voice.description: Select voice for the pre-ceremony announcement. Some voices have only the announcement without the ending.

volume.label: Volume
volume.description: Volume level for the application's audio presets.

volume_priority.label: Volume priority
volume_priority.description: Forces the selected level during the ceremony.

auto_unmute.label: Auto-unmute
auto_unmute.description: Automatically enables sound if it was muted in the system.

pause.label: Pause other players
pause.description: Pauses music and video (Spotify, YouTube) during the ceremony.

overlay.label: Visual overlay
overlay.description: Show full-screen memorial overlay during the ceremony.

about.description: The application was created to honor the memory of fallen defenders and victims of war.
about.acknowledgments: Desktop version inspired by Bohdan Hdal's app.
about.slava: Every day at 09:00 we remember everyone whose lives were taken by the war. Glory to the Heroes.
